_comment: Prototype phrases for the latent planner. Each query is classified by cosine similarity to these in BGE-M3 embedding space. Add a phrasing here to teach the planner a new way of asking — no retraining needed in prototype mode. These same phrases seed train_planner.py for the MLP head.

data: what was the total revenue in Oran
compare churn rate between Algiers and Constantine
show the weekly arpu trend for prepaid subscribers
average revenue per user last month
how many active subscribers in Setif
what is the prepaid churn rate by wilaya
total opex for the last quarter
which wilaya has the highest revenue
number of gross adds for postpaid
data usage per user in Annaba
give me the recharge rate trend
definition: what is the meaning of active base
what does net adds stand for
meta: what kind of questions can I ask
unanswerable: what is the fpa quantum score
show me the blockchain adoption metric
what is the customer happiness index
give me the satellite coverage ratio
what is the employee turnover rate
what is the weather in Oran

email: email this to the finance director
mail the report to the team
shoot an email to the manager
